action.reasoning: Observation: Iteration 19 achieved a new best test AP of 0.24796 using TTA with 16 stochastic forward passes on the best_state_dict. Remaining time is ~35 minutes — too short for any new training run. Analysis: The highest-probability zero-cost improvement left is to ensemble TTA predictions from both the best validation checkpoint and the EMA weights saved in the same file. Averaging 16 TTA runs from each state (32 total) should reduce variance further and potentially squeeze out a small gain. Time budget allows this (~4-5 min). Decision: Update predict.py to sequentially load both available state dicts (best + ema), run 16 TTA passes per state, average all predictions, and submit eval immediately.
